channel.title: U.S. Financial News, Markets, Banking and Business — Investment Banking
channel.description: Latest U.S. market news, banking updates, business insights, investigations, and real-time analysis to keep you informed on key financial developments

item.title: SpaceX $75B IPO Launch Boosts Tech Stocks
item.description:
SpaceX raises $75B in historic IPO at $135/share, sparking tech market rally and investor confidence in commercial space and Starlink growth.

Key points:
• SpaceX priced 555.56 million shares at $135 each, marking the largest IPO in U.S. history and valuing the company at about $1.77 trillion.
• Shares are set to begin trading on the Nasdaq under the ticker SPCX, with strong demand from both institutional and retail investors.
• The IPO has lifted broader tech sentiment, with major indexes and tech ETFs rallying on optimism about future growth in space, satellite broadband, and AI innovations.
• Analysts caution that high valuation multiples and long‑term profitability depend on Starlink scaling and future ventures, but market exuberance is driving near‑term momentum.

Read the full article: SpaceX $75B IPO Launch Boosts Tech Stocks
